name: The Center for Regenerative Medicine
description: The Center for Regenerative Medicine specializes in advanced regenerative medicine technologies, offering non-surgical treatments for conditions like Parkinson's, arthritis, and sports injuries. By utilizing autologous stem cells and innovative rehabilitation techniques, the center aims to restore patients' functional levels of life.

name: Reclaim Health Corp
description: Regenerative Solutions is a key player in regenerative medicine, offering advanced techniques like stem cell therapy and genetic engineering for tissue repair and organ rejuvenation. Their comprehensive services and innovative products aim to enhance patient care and operational efficiency for healthcare providers.

name: Regeneron
description: Regeneron is a prominent biotechnology company dedicated to developing innovative medicines for serious diseases, utilizing advanced technologies like VelocImmune® to create optimized fully-human antibodies. Their diverse pipeline addresses various health conditions, showcasing their commitment to transforming patient care through scientific discovery.

name: Tissue Regenix
description: Tissue Regenix Group aims to be a leader in regenerative medicine, focusing on innovative products that enhance patient care and promote natural tissue regeneration through the body's own cells. Their commitment to transforming treatment through advanced technologies positions them at the forefront of this expanding field.

name: Regenerative Medicine of North Atlanta
description: The company specializes in regenerative medicine, particularly through stem cell therapy, to help alleviate chronic pain. They offer holistic health solutions that empower the body to repair and regenerate itself, presenting a viable alternative to surgery and prescription medications.

name: INCELL Corporation
description: INCELL is a specialized manufacturer and contract services provider in biomedicine, dedicated to developing innovative treatments for unmet medical needs, which aligns with the focus on regenerative medicine. Their commitment to high quality and ethical standards supports the advancement of biotechnological products in this field.

name: Regenesis Biomedical
description: Regenesis is focused on enhancing human welfare through innovative, energy-based medical products designed to alleviate pain and improve quality of life. Their commitment to research and development, alongside a strong leadership team with a military background, underscores their dedication to advancing medical technology.

name: RegenTx Inc.
description: The company specializes in providing advanced tools for regenerative medicine treatments, such as platelet-rich plasma and autologous stem cell technologies, along with high-resolution ultrasound assessment and needle guidance.

name: RMI-International
description: RMI Health is at the forefront of regenerative medicine, continuously developing innovative treatments aimed at enhancing health and longevity. Their ISO 7-Certified facility emphasizes advanced stem cell production and therapeutic approaches for recovery and wellness.

name: InGeneron
description: InGeneron is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing regenerative medicine through innovative cell-based technologies. Their Transpose® RT cell therapy platform enables the rapid and efficient isolation of a patient's own regenerative cells for same-day treatment, and they are currently pursuing FDA approval to ensure the safety and effectiveness of their therapies.
